description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a striking two-tone color scheme of red and black, accented by gold trim. The car features aggressive styling with sharp lines, a vented hood, and a prominent rear wing spoiler for enhanced downforce. The wheels are large and sporty, with the front and rear rims differing in color—one gold and one white—adding a unique visual flair. The side windows are sharply raked, and the roofline flows smoothly into the rear, emphasizing its fastback silhouette. The front fascia is equipped with angular headlights and multiple air intakes, while the rear showcases a series of vents and a diffuser for improved aerodynamics. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, performance, and modern aesthetics, likely inspired by supercars or concept vehicles.
description: A striking, low-profile coupe car with a red and black body, gold accents, and a large rear wing, featuring aggressive styling and sporty wheels.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the vented engine cover, prominent rear wing, and diffuser, with taillights and gold accents visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-tone body, gold and white wheels, large rear wing, and sharply raked windows.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the angular headlights, vented hood, wide stance, and gold trim on the lower bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible side windows, two-tone paint, and the distinctive rear wing.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
